text: Meeting deadlines is a crucial skill for professional success. The key is effective time management—break large tasks into smaller steps and allocate time wisely. Prioritization matters too; identify the most important tasks and tackle them first. Sometimes, you may realize a project's scope is too large for the given timeframe. When this happens, practice scope management by discussing potential adjustments with your team or supervisor. Finally, never underestimate the power of communication. If you anticipate delays, inform stakeholders early and propose solutions. With these strategies, you can stay on track and achieve your goals.
